about-intro: Computer Engineer with a multidisciplinary background in software development, networking, telecommunications and IT infrastructure. Experienced in building web applications, managing servers, integrating systems and resolving technical incidents in real-world environments.
about-intro-2: Skilled in Angular, Node.js, TypeScript, PHP, SQL, networking and IT infrastructure. Able to adapt quickly to new environments and build efficient solutions focused on process optimization.
about-intro-3: I integrate artificial intelligence tools such as Claude, Codex and Antigravity into my daily workflow to speed up development, automate tasks and raise code quality.
